artifact_role: Hourly-updatable register for bounded defense of branch-local recovery no-gos. It changes no claim status or verdict.
history_conflict_rule: If the same obstruction was previously cleared for the same frozen construction, stop with INTEGRITY_CONFLICT and reconcile the premises before banking or defending the new no-go.
selection_rule: Work the highest-information pending history audit and continue into Swing 1 in the same run when no integrity conflict appears and capacity remains. Complete Swing 1 for every newly admitted no-go before spending a second rescue swing on one target, unless a Swing-1 result exposes a cheap decisive test that would moot the others.
resume_rule: After the conditional unitarity certificate reaches an endpoint, resume Swing 2 and Swing 3 for every non-exhausted no-go target.
stop_rule: Accept construction-class exhaustion only after the predeclared space has been tested and any survivor has faced an adversarial twin. A legitimate reframe must explain more, not merely survive.
preservation_rule: A new survivor does not erase the original branch-local no-go. It creates a separately frozen construction candidate.

targets.title: Exact-vacuum GR residual under the W229 record-current branch

history_audit.summary: Prior work cleared the imported-vacuum linear residual and the record-current theta row, but no prior result cleared the same nonzero Q^TF(B) plus zero W229 record-current source obstruction for this frozen construction.

search_receipt.boundedness_note: Mechanism search, not exhaustive proof of every historical phrasing; sufficient to identify the material same-obstruction candidates in active GU history.

prior_encounters.construction_fork: imported Schwarzschild weak-field metric with GU-native Willmore residual bookkeeping
prior_encounters.outcome: Linear-in-M Willmore residual is identically zero by harmonicity; leading residual remains quadratic Q(B) and the verdict stays OPEN.
prior_encounters.applicability: Confirms there is no linear early-disproof signal, but explicitly leaves the quadratic residual as the standing obstruction rather than clearing it.

prior_encounters.construction_fork: principled graph-Hessian II with ambient-curvature and H-class/II-class alternatives
prior_encounters.outcome: Computes nonzero Q^TF(B), resolves the slow-falloff artifact, and identifies possible ambient or H-class balance mechanisms as different construction questions.
prior_encounters.applicability: Supports the residual's existence; possible balances require an ambient/H-class or theta-source construction not identical to the W229 record-current vacuum source tested here.

prior_encounters.construction_fork: imported exact Schwarzschild, Psi=0, conservative IG branch, computable linear slice
prior_encounters.outcome: Every built term has zero linear-in-M residual, while the leading built contribution is the quadratic Q(B) obstruction.
prior_encounters.applicability: Cheap-read compatibility at linear order; explicitly not exact GR recovery and not a cancellation of Q^TF(B).

prior_encounters.construction_fork: W229-built record-current theta equation in the Psi=0 vacuum
prior_encounters.outcome: J[Psi=0]=0 forces theta=0, so the theta-sector residual vanishes.
prior_encounters.applicability: This is part of the current obstruction: the available W229 source/YM cancellation tensor is zero, so it cannot cancel nonzero Q^TF(B).

prior_encounters.construction_fork: imported exact Kerr, Psi=0, harmonic-gauge linear-in-M slice
prior_encounters.outcome: Linear Willmore residual clears on Kerr; the O(M^2) Q(B) obstruction remains the standing higher-order issue.
prior_encounters.applicability: Extends linear cheap-read compatibility to rotation; does not clear the quadratic cancellation target.

prior_encounters.construction_fork: record-sourced induced-YM branch-3 action with screened-Poisson source law
prior_encounters.outcome: Builds the nonlocal record-current source law and localizes the W154 posit, with kappa and Z_U still normalization data.
prior_encounters.applicability: Supplies the source law used by the current no-go; it does not provide a nonzero vacuum source or a Q^TF(B) canceller.

completed_swings.summary: The no-go minimizes to the current branch's nonzero principled Schwarzschild Q^TF(B) residual plus the W229 record-current vacuum rule Psi=0 -> J=0 -> theta=0. It is not contradicted by prior linear cheap-read clears.
minimized_obstruction: the W229 source law uses record current J[Psi]
Psi=0 in the imported vacuum gives J=0
finite positive screened operator gives theta=0
available source/YM cancellation tensor is zero
kappa and Z_U cannot tune a zero tensor into -Q^TF(B)

comparator only, not importable as GU dynamics

conditional_unitarity.question: Given a precisely typed boundary adapter and favorable branch inputs, is the adapter sufficient for the frozen GU construction to produce a positive physical state space and unitary or state-preserving dynamics without further sector-specific imports?
